S.FORM: MarShon Brooks 1 bulad 26 demiad, 1989 a mihca, MarShon Brooks, miunduay.
S.PHON: marsħon brooks * bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, marsħon brooks, miunduaj.
